meta_title: Removals Heathfield | Sussex Movers | Mark Ratcliffe Moving
meta_description: Heathfield removals from Lower Dicker. 40+ years experience across Sussex, BAR registered, premium pad-wrap protection. Free quote.
intro_paragraph: Heathfield is in our backyard — a thirty-minute run from our Lower Dicker depot via the A267. We have been moving Heathfield homes since 1982, including the village edges at Cross-in-Hand, Old Heathfield, Punnetts Town and Horam. We are a BAR-registered, family-run firm and our same trained crews handle a Heathfield bungalow with exactly the same pad-wrap care as a country mansion.

sections.body_html:
Heathfield is in our backyard — a thirty-minute run from our Lower Dicker depot via the A267. We have been moving Heathfield homes since 1982, including the village edges at Cross-in-Hand, Old Heathfield, Punnetts Town and Horam. We are a BAR-registered, family-run firm and our same trained crews handle a Heathfield bungalow with exactly the same pad-wrap care as a country mansion.

  • BAR-registered family business — 40+ years moving Sussex households
  • Premium pad-wrap protection on every item
  • Guaranteed move date once your 20% deposit is received
  • No charge for postponements, key waits or cancellations
  • Trained, uniformed crews in liveried vans

sections.heading: The Heathfield removal services we offer
sections.body_html:
The Heathfield removal services we offer

Full house removals

Single rooms, full houses, country estates. We pad-wrap, label, transport and place every item in your new home.

Learn more →

Man and van Heathfield

Smaller, budget-friendly moves. Same BAR-trained crew, smaller vehicle, hourly rate.

Learn more →

Storage near Heathfield

Individual steel Prestige rooms at our Lower Dicker depot. CCTV, alarmed access, monthly billing.

Learn more →

International from Heathfield

Specialist UK to Thailand and worldwide door-to-door relocation service from your Heathfield home.

Learn more →

Packing services

Full or fragile-only packing — our premium pad-wrap method is what separates a Mark Ratcliffe move from a generic remover.

Learn more →

Office & commercial

Out-of-hours business moves with minimal downtime. IT-equipment handling and document storage.

Learn more →

sections.heading: Why local matters when you choose a Heathfield removal company
sections.body_html:
Why local matters when you choose a Heathfield removal company

Choosing a local removal firm for your Heathfield move is not just about convenience — it is about cost, reliability and routing knowledge. From our Lower Dicker depot, our crews reach Heathfield via the A267 and A265, and they know the area's quirks: where parking is tight, which streets have low bridges, where the parking-suspension applications need to go and what time the school-run traffic builds up. National movers pricing in a Heathfield job have to factor in the long empty leg back to their yard; we do not, so our quotes are typically more competitive for Heathfield addresses.

We are also part of the local community. You will recognise our vans on the A267 and A265, you may have seen them at the Heathfield Independent Cinema, Cuckoo Trail and Heathfield Park, and our family has been part of Sussex life for over forty years. Many of our customers are repeat clients or referrals from neighbours we moved years earlier.

We cover Cross-in-Hand, Old Heathfield, Punnetts Town, Horam and Waldron as part of our standard Heathfield service area, with no extra travel charges within these districts.

sections.heading: How we protect your possessions
sections.body_html:
How we protect your possessions

Every Heathfield move uses our signature pad-wrap process. Each piece of furniture is individually wrapped in a thick quilted blanket inside your home, taped, labelled, then carried out — and only unwrapped once it is placed in its final position in your new property. This is the same method used by high-end international movers, and it is why our breakage rate is a fraction of the industry average.

sections.heading: A recent Heathfield move
sections.body_html:
A recent Heathfield move

Country house to coastal cottage from Heathfield

When a couple downsized from a 5-bedroom country home in Old Heathfield to a 2-bedroom coastal cottage, we deployed a four-man crew for one day of packing, two days of loading and one day of unpacking. Every item of antique furniture arrived intact thanks to our pad-wrap method.

sections.heading: What sets us apart from generic national movers
sections.body_html:
What sets us apart from generic national movers

Generic national removal firms quote your move based on volume and postcode distance — but they cover everywhere, so they know nowhere. They will not know the parking restrictions on your street, the tight stairwell in the older terraces, or the school-run window that determines whether a 7.5-tonne lorry can manoeuvre at 8.30am. We do. We are also accountable locally — many of our customers are repeat clients or referrals from neighbours, so the move-day experience matters to us in a way that a national chain simply cannot replicate. And finally, on price: our quotes typically beat the nationals on local moves because we are not pricing in the empty leg back to a Midlands depot.

sections.heading: What to expect on move day with us
sections.body_html:
What to expect on move day with us

Our crews follow the same routine on every move, regardless of property size: arrive 8.00–8.30am, walk the rooms with you, lay floor protection, pad-wrap furniture in the room before carrying out, load in a planned sequence, walk through the empty house with you before locking up, head to the new address, unload in reverse order placing furniture in the right room, unwrap and place each item, beds reassembled, final walk-through, sign-off. The whole process for a typical 3-bedroom local move runs 8am to 3-4pm.

sections.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
sections.body_html:
Frequently Asked Questions

How far is Heathfield from your depot?

About 30 minutes via the A267 — well within our standard service area. We do not charge a mileage premium for Heathfield moves.

Can you handle large country-property removals around Heathfield?

Yes. We routinely send multiple crews and multiple lorries for larger Heathfield properties, and we have the experience for antiques, art, pianos and wine cellars.

Do you offer storage near Heathfield?

Our Prestige steel storage rooms are at our Lower Dicker depot, around 35 minutes from Heathfield. Many country-property downsizers store with us during the transition.
